title: Gaussian HMM Regime Classifier — 3-State SPY Volatility Filter
summary: Train a 3-state Gaussian HMM (hmmlearn) on SPY daily log-returns to classify each day as Low-Vol/Trending, Medium, or High-Vol/Crisis. The model is trained on historical data and serialised; at runtime it predicts the current regime and gates or sizes new long trades accordingly. This directly implements the planned HMM Regime Detection backlog item with a concrete risk-management hook into the brain loop rather than just a label. MDPI's regime-switching factor paper found out-of-sample higher returns and lower drawdown versus individual factor models by routing capital to regime-appropriate strategies.
expected_impact: Reduces max drawdown 15–50% vs unfiltered strategy; eliminates trades in high-vol regimes where trend-following loses money; win rate lift ~5% in backtests (QuantStart, MDPI 2020 study)
